text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 19. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
